Equipment Rentals

Kayak & Beach Gear Rentals in Kailua

Premium equipment for your Oahu adventure. Kayaks, SUPs, e-bikes, snorkel gear, and beach essentials — rent by the day and explore at your own pace.

How Rentals Work

Simple, flexible, and hassle-free. Get geared up and on the water in minutes.

1

Book Online

Reserve your gear through our live booking system. Select your date, pick your equipment, and check out instantly.

2

Pick Up or Get Delivery

Swing by our Kailua Road shop for pickup, or choose delivery to Kailua Beach, Lanikai, or your accommodation (free within 3 miles).

3

Explore & Return

Enjoy your adventure! Return gear to our shop by closing time (6 PM) or schedule a pickup. Late returns? Just give us a heads up.

Choose Your Gear

All rentals include premium equipment, thorough orientation, and local tips from our team.

🛶

🚚

Free Delivery to Kailua Beach

Don't want to haul gear? We deliver kayaks, SUPs, beach chairs, umbrellas, and more directly to Kailua Beach Park, Lanikai Beach, or your vacation rental. Free delivery within 3 miles of our shop.

✓ Free delivery within 3 miles of Kailua
✓ Set up and orientation included
✓ Pickup at end of rental period
✓ $15 flat fee for 3-6 mile deliveries

Ready to Rent?

Check availability and reserve your gear now. Or call us — we'll help you pick the right equipment.

Book Rentals Online (808) 555-1234

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
